title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
